message:
fix: bd cleanup --hard always prunes tombstones immediately (bd-4q8)

When --hard --older-than N was used, customTTL was set to N days,
but tombstones were created with deleted_at=NOW. The pruning step
would then check IsExpired(N days) which returned false since the
tombstones were brand new. Now --hard always uses TTL=-1 (immediate
expiration) for the pruning step. The --older-than flag only controls
which closed issues to select for deletion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
